system.notes:
ESA mini-shuttle designed primarily for carrying construction crews.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.29): Hermes I-b Shuttle · 120 · 2 · 12 · Chemical · 5 · Battery · 50% · 2 · 20m3 · 2 · 4 · 1 · 7 · 3 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 120 million eb; Crew 2; Passengers 12; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 5; Power Type Battery; Sensors 50%; Computers 2; Cargo 20m3; Actions 2; Weapon Spaces 4; Armor (max SP) 1; Damage Points 7; Overkill Points 3; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
